message:
feat(websocket): add split read/write halves for concurrent I/O

Adds a first-class split API so send/recv can run concurrently on the same WebSocket.

- Introduce `WebSocketRead`/`WebSocketWrite` halves backed by a shared Arc + internal mutexed IO.
- Preserve cancel-safety and close-handshake correctness: control frames (ping/pong/close) are handled deterministically and pongs are forwarded between halves.
- Track half liveness with atomics; dropping one half does not implicitly close the connection, dropping both triggers close.
- Provide `reunite()` with a structured `ReuniteError` for mismatched halves.
- Wire exports through `src/net/websocket/mod.rs` and re-export the split types from `src/net/mod.rs` (WebSocketRead/WebSocketWrite/WsReuniteError).
